channel.title: Nicolas Hollmann Project Archive
channel.description: Archive for projects I've worked on.

item.title: Kana Trainer
item.description: This Kana-Trainer is a small React Application for learning/training Hiragana and Katakana.
item.content:encoded: This Kana-Trainer is a small React Application for learning/training Hiragana and Katakana.

item.title: First post
item.description: This is the first post on this archive, so I took this opportunity to write about this project. The idea is simple, this is an archive for…
item.content:encoded: This is the first post on this archive, so I took this opportunity to write about this project. The idea is simple, this is an archive for all projects I’ve worked on.
